sentences.arabic: آلَةُ العُودِ هِيَ وَاحِدَةٌ مِنْ أَقْدَمِ الآلَاتِ المُوسِيقِيَّةِ فِي العَالَمِ العَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Oud je jedan od najstarijih muzičkih instrumenata u arapskom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: The oud is one of the oldest musical instruments in the Arab world.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ العُودُ بِصَوْتِهِ الدَّافِئِ وَأَلْحَانِهِ العَمِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Oud se odlikuje toplim zvukom i dubokim melodijama.
sentences.translationEn: The oud is characterized by its warm sound and deep melodies.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَخْدَمَ الفَنَّانُونَ العَرَبُ هَذِهِ الآلَةَ لِلتَّعْبِيرِ عَنْ مَشَاعِرِهِمْ لِقُرُونٍ طَوِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Arapski umjetnici su vijekovima koristili ovaj instrument za izražavanje svojih osjećanja.
sentences.translationEn: Arab artists have used this instrument to express their feelings for long centuries.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الكَثِيرُ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ اليَوْمَ عَزْفَ العُودِ فِي المَعَاهِدِ المُوسِيقِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi ljudi danas uče svirati oud u muzičkim institutima.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people today learn to play the oud in music institutes.

sentences.arabic: تَبْقَى المُوسِيقَى التَّقْلِيدِيَّةُ جُزْءًا هَامًّا مِنَ الهُوِيَّةِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Tradicionalna muzika ostaje važan dio kulturnog identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: Traditional music remains an important part of cultural identity.
